title: EXPLORE 1 — KITCHEN room label
prompt: Close-up in @dream-house. @Sara on the LEFT crouches in front of one floor of the Dream House, finger pointing at a tiny printed sign on a pink mini door that reads "KITCHEN". @Eva on the RIGHT peers in over her shoulder. Sara (slowly): "K… I… T… C… H… E… N. KITCHEN!" Sara (giggling): "There's even a tiny kitchen!" Eva: "I want to see!" Warm morning light.
